name: zach
method: arrival-time regression (scatter-deconvolved EMG sub-band t0 vs nu^-2; coherent_dedisp at DSA DM); chime_dm.measure_dm
dm_status: independent CHIME DM (8 sub-bands @ S/N>=4); consistent with DSA within the 1 pc/cm^3 agreement floor

name: whitney
method: arrival-time regression (scatter-deconvolved EMG sub-band t0 vs nu^-2; coherent_dedisp at DSA DM); chime_dm.measure_dm
dm_status: does not constrain DM: scatter-limited (S/N-max DM biased high, 3-5 sub-bands); coherent re-analysis (v3 DM-phase / v4 envelope / v4b regression) confirms non-detection, not a +2-3 measurement. Lean on Pillar 4
